'''Naem Yrros''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|general]] in command of a base on [[Rhamalai]] aged 54. Naem attended the [[Raithal Academy/Legends|Raithal Academy]] where he graduated with the top honors in his class.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|13|The Occupation of Rhamalai}}
